title: Print All Maze Paths
hints: Use backtracking to explore all paths from (0,0) to (A-1, B-1).
At each position, you can move Down (D) or Right (R).
Try moving Down first, then Right to maintain lexicographical order.
When you reach (A-1, B-1), add the current path to the result.
After each recursive call, backtrack by removing the last move.
Keep track of current position (x, y) and the path taken so far.
